title: strophanthus gerrardii
intro: Strophanthus gerrardii is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to South Africa. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its cardiac glycosides, specifically strophanthin, which are used to treat heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of Strophanthus gerrardii include its ability to increase cardiac output, reduce blood pressure, and improve overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and tinctures, are often used in traditional medicine to treat various heart-related conditions.
